perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and jeans, stands in an indoor hallway. Behind her stands a man in a blue Adidas tracksuit with his face blurred. (2) The woman gestures with her hands, pointing to the man and performing rhythmic movements synchronized with the text overlays listing relationship preferences. Her facial expressions are cheerful and expressive. (3) Towards the end, the man wraps his arms around her from behind in a hug as she smiles and points to the final text overlay reveal.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat electronic dance track with a heavy bassline and male rap vocals starts immediately. (2) The music remains continuous with a consistent, energetic tempo throughout the video. (3) No ambient environmental noise or live spoken dialogue is audible; the soundscape consists entirely of the studio-produced background track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text at the top: '99% 女生的理想型 / 99% of Girls Will Agree'. (2) Sequential trait text: '帅哥 ✅' (Handsome guy - Positive), '暖男 ❌' (Warm man - Negative), '只对我好的男生 ✅' (Only good to me guy - Positive), '爱喝冬瓜茶的男生 ✅' (Guy who likes to drink winter melon tea - Positive). (3) Closing reveal text: '我已经有 💖' (I already have [one] - Romantic/Satisfied tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> List of traits -> Final reveal/hug.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator in foreground, 1 male with blurred face in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair wearing a white fitted long-sleeved top and light blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor residential hallway with a white door, a closet, and warm interior lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a popular short-video trend to list characteristics of an 'ideal boyfriend' while implicitly endorsing a specific beverage ('Winter Melon Tea'). It concludes with a romantic reveal of the creator's partner to engage viewers emotionally and showcase relationship satisfaction.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The text '爱喝冬瓜茶的男生' (Guy who likes to drink winter melon tea) is listed as a specific ideal trait, which is a common form of soft-product placement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Rhythmic hand gestures synced to text pop-ups; use of blurred 'mystery' partner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a classic Douyin/TikTok 'ideal type' challenge format, utilizing beat-sync editing to keep viewers engaged.
